name: Scallops & Mushrooms Brochette
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the scallops, then place them in a flat baking dish.
2. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (except mushrooms) and pour over the scallops, turning to coat all sides.
3. Marinate in the refrigerator for several hours.
4. Thread the scallops onto skewers alternately with mushroom caps.
5. Place on a rack and broil 3-4 inches from the heat for 8-10 minutes.
6. Turn the skewers and continue broiling for another 8-10 minutes, brushing several times with marinade during this process.
7. Serve with tartar sauce.
